title: Abahlobo FC impresses despite bronze defeat
description: KNYSNA NEWS - In their debut appearance at...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - In their debut appearance at the prestigious Woza Woza Tournament, newly formed Abahlobo FC from Knysna delivered an inspiring performance, despite a 3-0 loss to Wits FC of Jeffrey's Bay in the third-place play-off held last weekend at Kwanokuthula Stadium.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - In their debut appearance at the prestigious Woza Woza Tournament, newly formed Abahlobo FC from Knysna delivered an inspiring performance, despite a 3-0 loss to Wits FC of Jeffrey's Bay in the third-place play-off held last weekend at Kwanokuthula Stadium."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The match saw Wits striker Mvuyiseleli Myana score a superb hat-trick, securing the bronze medal and third-place cash prize for his side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Myana's clinical finishing proved to be the difference in a game filled with high energy and attacking intent.","html":"Myana's clinical finishing proved to be the difference in a game filled with high energy and attacking intent."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Standout effort in semis","html":"Standout effort in semis"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both teams had reached the semi-finals of Woza Woza Tournament Season 4, with Potso Stars (Hankey) beating Wits FC 2-0, while hosts Oriented Birds edged past Abahlobo FC 2-1.","html":"Both teams had reached the semi-finals of Woza Woza Tournament Season 4, with Potso Stars (Hankey) beating Wits FC 2-0, while hosts Oriented Birds edged past Abahlobo FC 2-1."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite the loss, Khanyiso Fatyela stood out for Abahlobo with an exceptional performance in midfield.","html":"Despite the loss, Khanyiso Fatyela stood out for Abahlobo with an exceptional performance in midfield."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Missed opportunities","html":"Missed opportunities"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The third-place match kicked off with both teams creating early chances. Myana opened the scoring for Wits FC in the first half, slotting past goalkeeper Wongalethu Siziba, giving Wits a 1-0 lead at halftime.","html":"The third-place match kicked off with both teams creating early chances. Myana opened the scoring for Wits FC in the first half, slotting past goalkeeper Wongalethu Siziba, giving Wits a 1-0 lead at halftime."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Abahlobo came out strong in the second half, with Sinovuyo Thanga denied twice by the woodwork in a frustrating spell for the Knysna side.","html":"Abahlobo came out strong in the second half, with Sinovuyo Thanga denied twice by the woodwork in a frustrating spell for the Knysna side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Myana added a second goal on the break and later converted a penalty after a defensive error to complete his hat-trick.","html":"Myana added a second goal on the break and later converted a penalty after a defensive error to complete his hat-trick."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite their best efforts, Abahlobo FC could not breach Wits' solid defence.","html":"Despite their best efforts, Abahlobo FC could not breach Wits' solid defence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Quarter-final results:","html":"Quarter-final results:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Potso Stars 2-1 Y2K (Plett)","html":"Potso Stars 2-1 Y2K (Plett)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Abahlobo FC 2–1 Mdodana FC (Gqeberha)","html":"Abahlobo FC 2–1 Mdodana FC (Gqeberha)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Oriented Birds 2–1 FC United (Knysna)","html":"Oriented Birds 2–1 FC United (Knysna)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wits FC 1(4)–1(3) Ngxongo Deluxe FC","html":"Wits FC 1(4)–1(3) Ngxongo Deluxe FC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Abahlobo FC impresses despite bronze defeat
